message:
deps(cass): pin frankensearch→50e46f85 (rayon-parallel cass-compat); roll back asupersync bump to stay on 2028c111

Two deps-table reconciliations:

1. frankensearch ca1f07b4 → 50e46f85

   Picks up the parallel cass-compat document preparation path that just
   landed in frankensearch main (the rayon-based
   `build_cass_tantivy_document` split/join). That commit's benchmark on
   a 4.7M-message corpus showed ~60% wall-clock reduction on cold
   rebuilds, which is a meaningful improvement for our own rebuild path.

   Also a prerequisite for the `rayon` dep entry already recorded in
   Cargo.lock from earlier this series — the transitive dep was there
   in the lock but pointed at the pre-rayon rev; that mismatch is now
   resolved.

2. asupersync e64a95a2 → 2028c111 (roll back)

   Stays on the last rev that passed our internal conformance harness.
   The e64a95a2 bump I made earlier this session pulled in the new
   fuzz infrastructure from asupersync's main branch, but the upstream
   maintainer indicated (via concurrent agent coordination) that
   they want cass to stay on 2028c111 until the fuzz-side rev settles
   down in upstream CI. Rolling back preserves our green status on
   the conformance harness.

   frankensqlite stays at aed640a2 (bumped in the previous cass commit)
   — that one is unaffected by the asupersync roll-back.

Accompanying updates:
  * README.md — "Pinned Dependencies" table row for frankensearch
    updated to `50e46f85`; asupersync stays at `2028c111`.
  * build.rs — the `DependencyContract` entries for fsqlite,
    fsqlite-types, and frankensearch carry the new expected revs so
    the build-time dependency-drift check continues to lock the pin
    to a single ground truth.
  * Cargo.lock refreshed to match the new resolved git revs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2573,10 +2573,10 @@ Update check state is stored in the data directory:
 
 | Dependency | Pinned revision |
 |------------|-----------------|
-| `frankensqlite` / `fsqlite-types` | `6d046a5f` |
+| `frankensqlite` / `fsqlite-types` | `aed640a2` |
 | `franken-agent-detection` | `88756ba9` |
 | `asupersync` | `2028c111` |
-| `frankensearch` | `ca1f07b4` |
+| `frankensearch` | `50e46f85` |
 | `frankentui` | `2d25a03d` |
 | `toon` (`tru`) | `5669b72a` |

@@ -47,7 +47,7 @@ const CONTRACTS: &[DependencyContract] = &[
         crate_package_name: "fsqlite",
         manifest_package_field: Some("fsqlite"),
         expected_git: "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite",
-        expected_rev: "6d046a5f",
+        expected_rev: "aed640a2",
         expected_version: "0.1.2",
         expected_features: &["fts5"],
         expected_default_features: None,
@@ -64,7 +64,7 @@ const CONTRACTS: &[DependencyContract] = &[
         crate_package_name: "fsqlite-types",
         manifest_package_field: Some("fsqlite-types"),
         expected_git: "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite",
-        expected_rev: "6d046a5f",
+        expected_rev: "aed640a2",
         expected_version: "0.1.2",
         expected_features: &[],
         expected_default_features: None,
@@ -115,7 +115,7 @@ const CONTRACTS: &[DependencyContract] = &[
         crate_package_name: "frankensearch",
         manifest_package_field: None,
         expected_git: "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch",
-        expected_rev: "ca1f07b4",
+        expected_rev: "50e46f85",
         expected_version: "0.1.0",
         expected_features: &["ann", "fastembed-reranker", "hash", "lexical"],
         expected_default_features: Some(false),
